name: Publish Readiness Checker
description: Runs after content and design succeed (SEO may have escalated — partial DAGs still produce this summary). Produces the go-live checklist.

checks.fail: ❌ No package.json — cannot verify build pipeline

checks.prompt: Produce a website go-live checklist with 10 items across these categories: (1) Performance (3 items), (2) Accessibility (3 items), (3) Security (2 items), (4) Analytics (2 items). Mark each as REQUIRED or NICE-TO-HAVE. Note: SEO lane may have escalated — include SEO items in the checklist as REQUIRED manual tasks.
